metadata.jumi.testShortcut: This fixture is a Sprint 3A consumer materialization smoke for 100MiB. The producer does not publish to the HTTP source at runtime; a pre-seeded simple_http artifact source is used instead.
metadata.jumi.obsoleteCompatibility: The consumer uses nan via the runtime shortcut image only to validate remote_fetch materialization. This is a VM happy-path profile, not the final artifact source design.

command:
mkdir -p /out; dd if=/dev/zero of=/out/report bs=1048576 count=100; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$JUMI_OUTPUT_MANIFEST_PATH")"; cat > "$JUMI_OUTPUT_MANIFEST_PATH" <<EOF
{"schemaVersion":"nan.artifactManifest.v1","runId":"${JUMI_RUN_ID}","sampleRunId":"${JUMI_SAMPLE_RUN_ID}","nodeId":"${JUMI_NODE_ID}","attemptId":"${JUMI_ATTEMPT_ID}","containerName":"main","nanVersion":"manual-vm-profile","createdAt":"2026-05-22T00:00:00Z","outputRoot":"/out","artifacts":[{"outputName":"report","declaredPath":"report","absolutePath":"/out/report","uri":"http://simple-http-artifact-source/artifacts/dataset-100mb.bin","digest":"sha256:20492a4d0d84f8beb1767f6616229f85d44c2827b64bdbfb260ee12fa1109e0e","sizeBytes":104857600,"type":"file"}]}
EOF
cat "$JUMI_OUTPUT_MANIFEST_PATH" > /dev/termination-log

mkdir -p /out; printf 'uri=%s materialization=%s expectedDigest=%s localPath=%s\n' "$JUMI_INPUT_DATASET_URI" "$JUMI_INPUT_DATASET_MATERIALIZATION_MODE" "$JUMI_INPUT_DATASET_EXPECTED_DIGEST" "$JUMI_INPUT_DATASET_LOCAL_PATH"; test -f "$JUMI_INPUT_DATASET_LOCAL_PATH"; sha256sum "$JUMI_INPUT_DATASET_LOCAL_PATH"; wc -c "$JUMI_INPUT_DATASET_LOCAL_PATH"; cp "$JUMI_INPUT_DATASET_LOCAL_PATH" /out/consumed
